description: Closed agent role registry for lore. resolve_model_for_role(<role>) consults this list before consulting the per-repo and user role->model bindings. Adding a role requires updating this file, scripts/lib.sh resolve_model_for_role, tui/internal/config/config.go ResolveModelForRole, and tests/frameworks/roles.bats.

roles.description: Coordinator agent that plans phases, spawns workers, and gates phase transitions on returned reports.
Task-iterating implementation agent that claims tasks from a queue and emits Tier 2 evidence anchored to file:line ranges.
Task-iterating investigation agent that explores design space and produces synthesis reports without modifying source files.
Single-batch evaluator that consumes a finished artifact (PR, plan, capture) and returns a verdict against a rubric.
Single-batch verdict agent that scores candidates against a closed rubric and emits a structured pass/fail decision (correctness gate, batch suitability).
Lightweight synthesis agent that compresses transcripts, capture queues, or review threads into thematic prose.
Resolution fallback consulted when a role binding is unset; never named directly by a call site.
